title: Chinese stranglehold on EV components

title: The case for a bond issue to boost reserves

title: SEBI Order in the Matter of Domus Capital LLP
description: SEBI enforcement order against Domus Capital LLP for violations of securities laws, directing specific penalties or remedial actions as determined by the adjudicating authority.

title: SEBI Order in the Matter of India Electronic Development Fund
description: SEBI enforcement order concerning the India Electronic Development Fund (IEDF), an SEBI-registered Alternative Investment Fund focused on the electronics and semiconductor sector.

title: SEBI Order in the Matter of Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Limited - Fund Diversion and RPT Non-Disclosure
description: SEBI order pursuant to Bombay High Court directions concerning Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Limited, its promoters Shishir Bajaj and Kushagra Bajaj, involving alleged diversion of over ₹1,189 crore and non-disclosure of related party transactions.

title: SEBI Order Against Future Retail Limited Directors for Fraud, Misleading Disclosures and Fund Diversion
description: SEBI passes a 222-page enforcement order against 11 noticees including Kishore Biyani and other top executives of Future Retail Limited for misleading disclosures, understatement of debt, non-disclosure of related party transactions, and diversion of company funds.

title: SEBI Order on Front Running by Prijesh Kurani and Others
description: SEBI issued an enforcement order against 7 noticees including Prijesh Kurani and associates for front running trades of big client Anustup Trading Private Limited during January 2022 to February 2023.

title: SEBI Order Against Unregistered Investment Advisors Running Telegram Channels Intraday Jackpot and Professional Day Trading Institute
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against Akshay Kumar and five others for operating unregistered investment advisory and research analyst services through Telegram channels, collecting fees and making fraudulent profit claims.

title: Final Order Against Arun Panchariya in GDR Issue by Winsome Yarns Ltd.
description: SEBI issues a final adjudication order against Arun Panchariya for his role in fraudulent Global Depository Receipt (GDR) transactions by Winsome Yarns Ltd., following remand by SAT to recompute the penalty quantum.

title: Order Against M/s AFCO Capital India Private Limited - Merchant Banker Restrictions
description: SEBI issues order against AFCO Capital India Private Limited (SEBI Reg. No. INM000012555) for violations of Merchant Bankers Regulations, Intermediaries Regulations, PFUTP and PIT Regulations following inspection for April 2022 to August 2024.

title: Order in the matter of Front-running trades of Big Client - Sarvottam Securities Private Limited by multiple entities
description: SEBI order against four individuals — Mr. Sunny Bhatia, Mrs. Surbhi Chopra Bhatia, Mrs. Mamta Rani, and Mr. Kumar Ashok — for front-running trades of Big Client Sarvottam Securities Pvt. Ltd. in equity derivatives during January 2018 to December 2022.

title: SEBI Order Against Retro Green Revolution Limited - Price Manipulation and Market Fraud
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against 21 noticees including promoters and associates of Retro Green Revolution Limited for price manipulation, volume creation, and fraudulent trading activities on BSE.

title: Order Against Cash Cow Broking & Advisory Solutions for Unregistered Investment Advisory Activities
description: SEBI passes directions against Cash Cow Broking & Advisory Solutions and its partners for conducting investment advisory services without registration, ordering refund of fees collected from investors.

title: SEBI Order Against Arcotech Limited: Fund Diversion and Financial Statement Misrepresentation
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against Arcotech Limited and 13 related entities for alleged fund diversion of Rs.14.15 crores, fictitious transactions, and misrepresentation of financial statements across FY 2016-17 to 2020-21.

title: SEBI Order Against Mediaone Global Entertainment Ltd. for Fund Diversion and Financial Manipulation
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against Mediaone Global Entertainment Ltd. and its directors for alleged fund diversion and financial irregularities linked to Eros International Media Limited, involving a write-off of ₹63.61 crore.

title: Order in the matter of trading activities of certain entities in the scrip of DU Digital Technologies Limited (now DU Digital Global Limited)
description: SEBI order against 27 entities for employing deceptive trading strategies and contributing to artificial price and volume manipulation in DU Digital scrip during August 26, 2021 to March 31, 2023.

title: As smartwatch fears fade, Ethos expands deeper into luxury watches
description: Ethos says analogue watches are regaining relevance as aspiration-led purchases, prompting the retailer to expand stores, target younger buyers and push into luxury lifestyle categories despite margin pressure.

title: OpenAI will pay  ₹3.7 crore to worry about a problem that may not exist yet. The job? Stop AI from building itself
description: OpenAI is hiring a safety researcher at up to &nbsp; ₹3.7 crore ($445,000) to prepare for AI that can train itself. The job listing asks for someone ‘tasteful and strategic’ enough to reason about risks that do not yet exist.

title: Japan’s Akazawa Says He Spoke Briefly With China Commerce Minister
description: Japanese Trade Minister Ryosei Akazawa and Chinese Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had a brief chat on Friday, the first ministerial-level exchange of words between the two nations since a diplomatic standoff started in November.

title: Seven ways AI is making 2025 tech layoffs different from Silicon Valley’s earlier job cuts
description: Tech layoffs in 2025 are increasingly targeting middle management and coordination-heavy roles as companies restructure around AI. Firms like Amazon, Meta and Shopify are pushing flatter hierarchies, AI-first hiring and smaller teams instead of broad pandemic-style cuts.

title: Legal fight could delay a proposed $7B settlement for lawsuits in Roundup cancer claims
description: Legal fight could delay a proposed $7B settlement for lawsuits in Roundup cancer claims

title: SpaceX’s Money-Losing Rockets Are Biggest Asset in AI Dream
description: SpaceX revealed eye-popping numbers in its IPO prospectus, including a $26.5 trillion potential market for an empire spanning artificial intelligence and telecommunications.

title: Wingtech seeks $1.2 billion damages in new suit against Nexperia
description: WINGTECH-CHINA-NEXPERIA:Wingtech seeks $1.2 billion damages in new suit against Nexperia

title: Sun Pharma guides for slower FY27 growth amid regulatory, macro challenges
description: Sun Pharma forecasts high single-digit revenue growth for FY27 after an 11.9% increase in FY26 revenue. The company aims to expand its innovative portfolio amid regulatory challenges and compliance issues, while also focusing on acquisitions and new product launches in the obesity-drug market.

title: Central Bank OFS subscribed 2.35 times on Day-1, govt exercises green shoe option
description: The strong response to the OFS comes at a time when the government has set an ambitious disinvestment and asset monetization target of  ₹80,000 crore for FY27, nearly 135% higher than the revised divestment estimate of  ₹33,837 crore for FY26.

title: Hindalco profit slumps on heat from Novelis fire
description: The profit decline stemmed mainly from  ₹6,963 crore in one-off expenses linked to the Oswego plant disruption in New York last year. Operations of Novelis, a key supplier of rolled aluminium to can makers and auto companies, were affected by the fire.

title: KG-D6 row: Niko tells SC ONGC didn’t develop fields, rejects gas theft claim
description: In 2013, ONGC raised concerns that gas reservoirs in its blocks might be connected to those in the KG-D6 field. A US consulting firm DeGolyer and MacNaughton (D&amp;M) examined the issue. In 2015, D&amp;M concluded that gas worth over  ₹11,000 crore had migrated from ONGC’s fields to KG-D6.

title: FDA staff blindsided by move allowing more e-cigarettes and nicotine pouches onto US market
description: FDA staff blindsided by move allowing more e-cigarettes and nicotine pouches onto US market

title: E-commerce giant Flipkart partners with India Post to boost last-mile parcel delivery service: Details
description: E-commerce giant Flipkart on Friday announced that it signed an agreement with the Department of Posts to improve the last-mile parcel delivery. The collaboration will leverage delivery network of the Department of Posts along with Flipkart's strong presence in India's e-commerce sector

title: Wakefit flags margin pressure from input inflation, shares fall 7%
description: Wakefit warned that a sharp rise in crude oil-linked input costs could weigh on margins and near-term profitability despite the recent price hikes—showing how elevated oil prices due to the Iran war-led disruptions are starting to squeeze consumer businesses beyond fuel-intensive sectors.

title: Delhi HC shields IndiGo from  ₹458-cr GST over engine compensation dispute
description: The case goes back to 2018-19 and 2019-20 when engine defects forced IndiGo to ground some aircraft. The airline lost flying hours and suffered business losses. To make up for these losses, the foreign engine supplier issued IndiGo credit notes worth around  ₹2,000 cr, on which the govt sought GST.

title: Tata Motors broadens global ambitions with Stellantis partnership
description: A deeper engagement with Stellantis signals growing confidence in Tata Motors' capabilities.

title: LTM buys Randstad's Europe, Australia units in first acquisition since merger
description: The $186-million deal for Randstad expands LTM's revenue base by $500 million and enhances its capabilities in various sectors while aligning with its ambitious growth plans.

title: LG India expects mid-teen revenue growth in FY27 after dampened year as localization increases
description: LG Electronics India's record quarterly profit came after broad-based demand recovery as the company rolled out products in the premium and budget-friendly segments.

title: AI firm C5i revives IPO plans, eyes  ₹1,200 crore raise amid sector momentum
description: 360 One-backed C5i has restarted IPO discussions to raise  ₹1,000-1,200 crore, betting on stronger market sentiment and rising enterprise demand for AI-led transformation.

title: Dalmia Bharat to buy JAL cement assets from Adani Group for  ₹2,850 crore
description: The acquisition of cement assets of bankrupt Jaiprakash Associates will help Dalmia Bharat deepen its presence in central India and increase cement capacity by nearly 10%, or 5.2 mtpa.

title: Ola Electric’s home inverter play has a chemistry problem
description: The company’s decision to use expensive NMC cells instead of industry-standard LFP chemistry for its lithium-ion batteries has led to a massive revenue shortfall and slowdown in its home energy storage business.

title: Beyond tech: real estate, staffing firms invest in data centres, GCC practice to meet growing needs
description: Non-IT companies are seizing the tech wave. Partnerships like Uber and Adani are just the tip of the iceberg. As real estate firms dive into this lucrative market, the potential for growth is immense.&nbsp;

title: Air India CEO says successor will have hands full
description: AIR-INDIA-CEO:Air India CEO says successor will have 'hands full'

title: IBM Shares Soar on US Funding for $2 Billion Quantum Push
description: The Trump administration has agreed to award $1 billion to International Business Machines Corp. to build a foundry for producing quantum computing chips, part of a broad strategy to bolster US leadership in an emerging industry.

title: Swiggy shareholders push back against more power to founder CEO Sriharsha Majety
description: Swiggy shareholders have rejected a proposal that would’ve given founder CEO Sriharsha Majety disproportionate control of the board, even if his stake fell to 2.45%.

title: Early investors look to sell Paytm shares worth $110 million via block deal
description: The stake sale marks another gradual exit by early backers as investor sentiment improves after Paytm returned to profitability following regulatory setbacks.

title: LIC sees West Asia war hitting insurance growth amid lower savings
description: LIC expects the West Asia crisis to weigh on renewal premium growth.

title: CESL to supply 300 electric water tankers to Delhi Jal Board
description: The initiative is aligned with Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s call for the adoption of electric vehicles, says CESL.

title: Maruti Suzuki to hike prices across models by up to  ₹30,000 from June 2026
description: Maruti Suzuki will increase prices of its models across its portfolio by up to  ₹30,000 with effect from June 2026.

title: KG Basin row: RIL claims returns to govt surpass what ONGC could have delivered
description: The RIL-led consortium defended its extraction of ‘fugitive’ gas as a natural occurrence, arguing that its timely development prevented a $1.4 billion loss to the state and provided superior profit-sharing compared to a potential ONGC operation.

title: ITC revenue grows 17% as cigarette tax bites, consumer brands surge
description: While the cigarettes division posted healthy numbers, the firm cautioned that high taxes imposed in Feb may encourage illicit sales. Meanwhile, ITC’s packaged consumer brands business grew rapidly in the March 2026 quarter. However, the Iran war may dampen growth across verticals

title: United Nations top court says right to strike is protected by a key labor treaty
description: United Nations' top court says right to strike is protected by a key labor treaty

title: Mamaearth parent proposes  ₹3-per-share dividend, its first ever, after record profit in Q4
description: The company will return nearly  ₹98 crore to shareholders as net profit surged 178% in the March quarter, driven by a record performance from younger brands like The Derma Co.

title: QSR chains brace for slower growth, margin pressure after weak FY26 demand
description: QSR chains are shifting focus from rapid expansion to profitability, emphasizing value meals and cost management in response to changing consumer spending habits.

title: Amazon India targets beauty boom with 100 global brands as online rivalry rises
description: &nbsp;The premium beauty segment is growing rapidly, with significant demand from tier-two and tier-three cities, and rising consumer spending projected to make India's beauty market worth $40 billion by 2030.
